center.name: 熱帶和亞熱帶濕潤闊葉林
center.summary: 熱帶和亞熱帶濕潤闊葉林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联91种鸟类，包括伯氏穴䳍、巴西穴䳍、銹紅林鷓鴣等91种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.evidence: It is found in humid forest in northeastern Brazil, where it is known from the states of Pernambuco, Alagoas, Sergipe and the northernmost Bahia. It is usually thought to be widespread, but seen at low density in its increasingly fragmented range. Its population is estimated to be around 1,000–2,500 individuals, currently in decline due to deforestation and habitat loss
